          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "## Where to Place the Post Files"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "Your post files should be placed in &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; directory. You can also create sub-directories to better organize your posts and assets."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "├── post-1.md"

          {

            "text": "└── post-2/"

            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    ├── cover.png"

            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"

        ],
        "originalContents": "| &#96;description&#96; | A short description of the post. Displayed on index page.                                                                                                                                                   |\n| &#96;image&#96;       | The cover image path of the post.\u003cbr/\u003e1. Start with &#96;http://&#96; or &#96;https://&#96;: Use web image\u003cbr/\u003e2. Start with &#96;/&#96;: For image in &#96;public&#96; dir\u003cbr/\u003e3. With none of the prefixes: Relative to the markdown file |\n| &#96;tags&#96;        | The tags of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                       |\n| &#96;category&#96;    | The category of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                   |\n| &#96;draft&#96;       | If this post is still a draft, which won't be displayed.                                                                                                                                                    |\n\n## Where to Place the Post Files\n\nYour post files should be placed in &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; directory. You can also create sub-directories to better organize your posts and assets.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/content/posts/\n├── post-1.md\n└── post-2/\n    ├── cover.png\n    └── index.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 49
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 31
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/content/posts/0000-00-00_guide/index.md"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tid?: string;\n\tsrc: string;\n\tclass?: string;\n\talt?: string;\n\tposition?: string;\n\tbasePath?: string;\n}\n\nimport { Image } from \"astro:assets\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\nconst { id, src, alt, position = \"center\", basePath = \"/\" } = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst isLocal = !(\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"/\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"http\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"https\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"data:\")\n);\nconst isPublic = src.startsWith(\"/\");\n\n// TODO temporary workaround for images dynamic import\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/3373\n// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noImplicitAnyLet: \u003ccheck later\u003e\nlet img;\nif (isLocal) {\n\tconst files = import.meta.glob\u003cImageMetadata\u003e(\"../../**\", {\n\t\timport: \"default\",\n\t});\n\tlet normalizedPath = path\n\t\t.normalize(path.join(\"../../\", basePath, src))\n\t\t.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\");\n\tconst file = files[normalizedPath];\n\tif (!file) {\n\t\tconsole.error(\n\t\t\t&#96;\\n[ERROR] Image file not found: ${normalizedPath.replace(\"../../\", \"src/\")}&#96;,\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\timg = await file();\n}\n\nconst imageClass = \"w-full h-full object-cover\";\nconst imageStyle = &#96;object-position: ${position}&#96;;\n---\n\u003cdiv id={id} class:list={[className, 'overflow-hidden relative']}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"transition absolute inset-0 dark:bg-black/10 bg-opacity-50 pointer-events-none\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n    {isLocal \u0026\u0026 img \u0026\u0026 \u003cImage src={img} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n    {!isLocal \u0026\u0026 \u003cimg src={isPublic ? url(src) : src} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tid?: string;\n\tsrc: string;\n\tclass?: string;\n\talt?: string;\n\tposition?: string;\n\tbasePath?: string;\n}\n\nimport { Image } from \"astro:assets\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\nconst { id, src, alt, position = \"center\", basePath = \"/\" } = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst isLocal = !(\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"/\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"http\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"https\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"data:\")\n);\nconst isPublic = src.startsWith(\"/\");\n\n// TODO temporary workaround for images dynamic import\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/3373\n// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noImplicitAnyLet: \u003ccheck later\u003e\nlet img;\nif (isLocal) {\n\tconst files = import.meta.glob\u003cImageMetadata\u003e(\"../../**\", {\n\t\timport: \"default\",\n\t});\n\tlet normalizedPath = path\n\t\t.normalize(path.join(\"../../\", basePath, src))\n\t\t.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\");\n\tconst file = files[normalizedPath];\n\tif (!file) {\n\t\tconsole.error(\n\t\t\t&#96;\\n[ERROR] Image file not found: ${normalizedPath.replace(\"../../\", \"src/\")}&#96;,\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\timg = await file();\n}\n\nconst imageClass = \"w-full h-full object-cover\";\nconst imageStyle = &#96;object-position: ${position}&#96;;\n---\n\u003cdiv id={id} class:list={[className, 'overflow-hidden relative']}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"transition absolute inset-0 dark:bg-black/10 bg-opacity-50 pointer-events-none\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n    {isLocal \u0026\u0026 img \u0026\u0026 \u003cImage src={img} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n    {!isLocal \u0026\u0026 \u003cimg src={isPublic ? url(src) : src} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://frontmatter.codes/frontmatter.schema.json\",\n  \"frontMatter.framework.id\": \"astro\",\n  \"frontMatter.preview.host\": \"http://localhost:4321\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.publicFolder\": \"public\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.pageFolders\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"posts\",\n      \"path\": \"[[workspace]]/src/content/posts\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"frontMatter.taxonomy.contentTypes\": [\n    {\n      \"name\": \"default\",\n      \"pageBundle\": true,\n      \"previewPath\": \"'blog'\",\n      \"filePrefix\": null,\n      \"clearEmpty\": true,\n      \"fields\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"title\",\n          \"name\": \"title\",\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"single\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"description\",\n          \"name\": \"description\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"published\",\n          \"name\": \"published\",\n          \"type\": \"datetime\",\n          \"default\": \"{{now}}\",\n          \"isPublishDate\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"preview\",\n          \"name\": \"image\",\n          \"type\": \"image\",\n          \"isPreviewImage\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"tags\",\n          \"name\": \"tags\",\n          \"type\": \"list\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"category\",\n          \"name\": \"category\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"draft\",\n          \"name\": \"draft\",\n          \"type\": \"boolean\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"language\",\n          \"name\": \"language\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n基于 [Astro](https://astro.build) 开发的静态博客模板。\n\n[**🖥️在线预览（Vercel）**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 功能特性\n\n- [x] 基于 Astro 和 Tailwind CSS 开发\n- [x] 流畅的动画和页面过渡\n- [x] 亮色 / 暗色模式\n- [x] 自定义主题色和横幅图片\n- [x] 响应式设计\n- [ ] 评论\n- [x] 搜索\n- [x] 文内目录\n\n## 👀 要求\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n使用 [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari) 在本地初始化项目。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n2. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n3. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. 使用此模板[生成新仓库](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)或 Fork 此仓库\n2. 进行本地开发，Clone 新的仓库，执行 &#96;pnpm install&#96; 和 &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; 以安装依赖  \n   - 若未安装 [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)，执行 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;\n3. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n4. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n5. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## ⚙️ 文章 Frontmatter\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n基于 [Astro](https://astro.build) 开发的静态博客模板。\n\n[**🖥️在线预览（Vercel）**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 功能特性\n\n- [x] 基于 Astro 和 Tailwind CSS 开发\n- [x] 流畅的动画和页面过渡\n- [x] 亮色 / 暗色模式\n- [x] 自定义主题色和横幅图片\n- [x] 响应式设计\n- [ ] 评论\n- [x] 搜索\n- [x] 文内目录\n\n## 👀 要求\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n使用 [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari) 在本地初始化项目。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n2. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n3. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. 使用此模板[生成新仓库](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)或 Fork 此仓库\n2. 进行本地开发，Clone 新的仓库，执行 &#96;pnpm install&#96; 和 &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; 以安装依赖  \n   - 若未安装 [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)，执行 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;\n3. 通过配置文件 &#96;src/config.ts&#96; 自定义博客\n4. 执行 &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; 创建新文章，并在 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; 目录中编辑\n5. 参考[官方指南](https://docs.astro.build/zh-cn/guides/deploy/)将博客部署至 Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages 等；部署前需编辑 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; 中的站点设置。\n\n## ⚙️ 文章 Frontmatter\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\n",

        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari  \n![Node.js \u003e= 20](https://img.shields.io/badge/node.js-%3E%3D20-brightgreen) \n![pnpm \u003e= 9](https://img.shields.io/badge/pnpm-%3E%3D9-blue) \n[![DeepWiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/DeepWiki-saicaca%2Ffuwari-blue.svg?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://deepwiki.com/saicaca/fuwari)\n[![FOSSA Status](https://app.fossa.com/api/projects/git%2Bgithub.com%2Fsaicaca%2Ffuwari.svg?type=shield\u0026issueType=license)](https://app.fossa.com/projects/git%2Bgithub.com%2Fsaicaca%2Ffuwari?ref=badge_shield\u0026issueType=license)\n\nA static blog template built with [Astro](https://astro.build).\n\n[**🖥️ Live Demo (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n🌏 README in\n",

        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari  \n![Node.js \u003e= 20](https://img.shields.io/badge/node.js-%3E%3D20-brightgreen) \n![pnpm \u003e= 9](https://img.shields.io/badge/pnpm-%3E%3D9-blue) \n[![DeepWiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/DeepWiki-saicaca%2Ffuwari-blue.svg?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://deepwiki.com/saicaca/fuwari)\n[![FOSSA Status](https://app.fossa.com/api/projects/git%2Bgithub.com%2Fsaicaca%2Ffuwari.svg?type=shield\u0026issueType=license)](https://app.fossa.com/projects/git%2Bgithub.com%2Fsaicaca%2Ffuwari?ref=badge_shield\u0026issueType=license)\n\nA static blog template built with [Astro](https://astro.build).\n\n[**🖥️ Live Demo (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n🌏 README in\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\ntitle: Simple Guides for Fuwari\npublished: 2024-04-01\ndescription: \"How to use this blog template.\"\nimage: \"./cover.jpeg\"\ntags: [\"Fuwari\", \"Blogging\", \"Customization\"]\ncategory: Guides\ndraft: draft\n---\n\n\u003e Cover image source: [Source](https://image.civitai.com/xG1nkqKTMzGDvpLrqFT7WA/208fc754-890d-4adb-9753-2c963332675d/width=2048/01651-1456859105-(colour_1.5),girl,_Blue,yellow,green,cyan,purple,red,pink,_best,8k,UHD,masterpiece,male%20focus,%201boy,gloves,%20ponytail,%20long%20hair,.jpeg)\n\nThis blog template is built with [Astro](https://astro.build/). For the things that are not mentioned in this guide, you may find the answers in the [Astro Docs](https://docs.astro.build/).\n\n## Front-matter of Posts\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\ndraft: false\n---\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n| Attribute     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                 |\n| ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |\n| &#96;title&#96;       | The title of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                      |\n| &#96;published&#96;   | The date the post was published.                                                                                                                                                                            |\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "title: Simple Guides for Fuwari"

          },

            "lineNumber": 4,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "This blog template is built with [Astro](https://astro.build/). For the things that are not mentioned in this guide, you may find the answers in the [Astro Docs](https://docs.astro.build/)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "## Front-matter of Posts"
          },

            "lineNumber": 16

            "text": "description: This is the first post of my new Astro blog."

          },

        "originalContents": "---\ntitle: Simple Guides for Fuwari\npublished: 2024-04-01\ndescription: \"How to use this blog template.\"\nimage: \"./cover.jpeg\"\ntags: [\"Fuwari\", \"Blogging\", \"Customization\"]\ncategory: Guides\ndraft: draft\n---\n\n\u003e Cover image source: [Source](https://image.civitai.com/xG1nkqKTMzGDvpLrqFT7WA/208fc754-890d-4adb-9753-2c963332675d/width=2048/01651-1456859105-(colour_1.5),girl,_Blue,yellow,green,cyan,purple,red,pink,_best,8k,UHD,masterpiece,male%20focus,%201boy,gloves,%20ponytail,%20long%20hair,.jpeg)\n\nThis blog template is built with [Astro](https://astro.build/). For the things that are not mentioned in this guide, you may find the answers in the [Astro Docs](https://docs.astro.build/).\n\n## Front-matter of Posts\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: My First Blog Post\npublished: 2023-09-09\ndescription: This is the first post of my new Astro blog.\nimage: ./cover.jpg\ntags: [Foo, Bar]\ncategory: Front-end\ndraft: false\n---\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n| Attribute     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                 |\n| ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |\n| &#96;title&#96;       | The title of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                      |\n| &#96;published&#96;   | The date the post was published.                                                                                                                                                                            |\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 33
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/content/posts/0000-00-00_guide/index.md"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n[Astro](https://astro.build) で構築された静的ブログテンプレート\n\n[**🖥️ライブデモ (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 特徴\n\n- [x] [Astro](https://astro.build) 及び [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com) で構築\n- [x] スムーズなアニメーションとページ遷移\n- [x] ライト/ダークテーマ対応\n- [x] カスタマイズ可能なテーマカラーとバナー\n- [x] レスポンシブデザイン\n- [ ] コメント機能\n- [x] 検索機能\n- [x] 目次\n\n## 👀 以下が必要\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n[create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari)を使用して、ローカルにプロジェクトを初期化します。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. &#96;src/config.ts&#96; ファイルを編集する事でブログを自分好みにカスタマイズ出来ます。\n2. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; で新しい記事を作成し、&#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.フォルダ内で編集します。\n3. 作成したブログをVercel、Netlify、GitHub Pagesなどにデプロイするには[ガイド](https://docs.astro.build/ja/guides/deploy/)に従って下さい。加えて、別途デプロイを行う前に &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; を編集してサイト構成を変更する必要があります。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. [テンプレート](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)から新しいリポジトリを作成するかCloneをします。\n",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 27,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "# pnpm"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "pnpm create fuwari@latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "# bun"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "bun create fuwari@latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "# deno"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "deno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest"
          },

            "lineNumber": 45

            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "1. &#96;src/config.ts&#96; ファイルを編集する事でブログを自分好みにカスタマイズ出来ます。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "2. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; で新しい記事を作成し、&#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.フォルダ内で編集します。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "3. 作成したブログをVercel、Netlify、GitHub Pagesなどにデプロイするには[ガイド](https://docs.astro.build/ja/guides/deploy/)に従って下さい。加えて、別途デプロイを行う前に &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; を編集してサイト構成を変更する必要があります。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "## 🚀 使用方法 2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "1. [テンプレート](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)から新しいリポジトリを作成するかCloneをします。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "2. ブログをローカルで編集するには、リポジトリをクローンした後、&#96;pnpm install&#96; と &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; を実行して依存関係をインストールします。  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n[Astro](https://astro.build) で構築された静的ブログテンプレート\n\n[**🖥️ライブデモ (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 特徴\n\n- [x] [Astro](https://astro.build) 及び [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com) で構築\n- [x] スムーズなアニメーションとページ遷移\n- [x] ライト/ダークテーマ対応\n- [x] カスタマイズ可能なテーマカラーとバナー\n- [x] レスポンシブデザイン\n- [ ] コメント機能\n- [x] 検索機能\n- [x] 目次\n\n## 👀 以下が必要\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 1\n\n[create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari)を使用して、ローカルにプロジェクトを初期化します。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. &#96;src/config.ts&#96; ファイルを編集する事でブログを自分好みにカスタマイズ出来ます。\n2. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; で新しい記事を作成し、&#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.フォルダ内で編集します。\n3. 作成したブログをVercel、Netlify、GitHub Pagesなどにデプロイするには[ガイド](https://docs.astro.build/ja/guides/deploy/)に従って下さい。加えて、別途デプロイを行う前に &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; を編集してサイト構成を変更する必要があります。\n\n## 🚀 使用方法 2\n\n1. [テンプレート](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)から新しいリポジトリを作成するかCloneをします。\n",

        "contents": "\u003ch1\u003e\u003cspan style=\"float:left; margin-right:5px;\"\u003eHi, I'm Tomoaki Tsutsui\u003c/span\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://media.giphy.com/media/hvRJCLFzcasrR4ia7z/giphy.gif\" width=\"28\"\u003e\u003c/h1\u003e\n\n\u003cp align=\"center\"\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?lines=Software+Developer;Flutter Engineer;MobileApp%20|%20DDD%20|%20OOP%20;Always%20learning%20new%20things\u0026center=true\u0026width=500\u0026height=50\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv\u003e\n    \u003cimg src=\"https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=tutttuwi\"/\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n**tutttuwi/tutttuwi** is a ✨ _special_ ✨ repository because its &#96;README.md&#96; (this file) appears on your GitHub profile.\n\nHere are some ideas to get you started:\n\n- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...\n- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...\n- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...\n- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...\n- 💬 Ask me about ...\n- 📫 How to reach me: ...\n- 😄 Pronouns: ...\n- ⚡ Fun fact: ...\n--\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n[icon]\n- use: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n- find here: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n--\u003e\n\n### 🛠 \u0026nbsp;Tech Stack\n\n#### Frontend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=flutter-dark,html,css,javascript,typescript,vuejs,bootstrap,angularjs,nextjs\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Backend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=java,spring,nodejs,python\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### ☁️ Cloud \u0026 Database\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=amazonewebservices-dark,azure-dark,googlecloud,postgresql,kubernetes,mongodb,sqlserver1-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Tools \u0026 Environments\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=git,gitlab,linux,visualstudiocode-dark,windows-dark,eclipse-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Misc\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=adobeillustrator,adobephotoshop,apachemaven-dark,chai-dark,gulp,mocha-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n### 🌈 Applications I developed\n\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003ch1\u003e\u003cspan style=\"float:left; margin-right:5px;\"\u003eHi, I'm Tomoaki Tsutsui\u003c/span\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://media.giphy.com/media/hvRJCLFzcasrR4ia7z/giphy.gif\" width=\"28\"\u003e\u003c/h1\u003e\n\n\u003cp align=\"center\"\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?lines=Software+Developer;Flutter Engineer;MobileApp%20|%20DDD%20|%20OOP%20;Always%20learning%20new%20things\u0026center=true\u0026width=500\u0026height=50\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv\u003e\n    \u003cimg src=\"https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=tutttuwi\"/\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n**tutttuwi/tutttuwi** is a ✨ _special_ ✨ repository because its &#96;README.md&#96; (this file) appears on your GitHub profile.\n\nHere are some ideas to get you started:\n\n- 🔭 I’m currently working on ...\n- 🌱 I’m currently learning ...\n- 👯 I’m looking to collaborate on ...\n- 🤔 I’m looking for help with ...\n- 💬 Ask me about ...\n- 📫 How to reach me: ...\n- 😄 Pronouns: ...\n- ⚡ Fun fact: ...\n--\u003e\n\n\u003c!--\n[icon]\n- use: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n- find here: \u003chttps://thuongtruong109.github.io/icoziv/\u003e\n--\u003e\n\n### 🛠 \u0026nbsp;Tech Stack\n\n#### Frontend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=flutter-dark,html,css,javascript,typescript,vuejs,bootstrap,angularjs,nextjs\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Backend\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=java,spring,nodejs,python\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### ☁️ Cloud \u0026 Database\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=amazonewebservices-dark,azure-dark,googlecloud,postgresql,kubernetes,mongodb,sqlserver1-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Tools \u0026 Environments\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=git,gitlab,linux,visualstudiocode-dark,windows-dark,eclipse-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n#### Misc\n\n\u003cp\u003e\n  \u003cimg src=\"https://i.icoziv.workers.dev/icons?i=adobeillustrator,adobephotoshop,apachemaven-dark,chai-dark,gulp,mocha-dark\" alt=\"Skills\" /\u003e\n\u003c/p\u003e\n\n### 🌈 Applications I developed\n\n",

        "contents": "import { defineCollection, z } from \"astro:content\";\n\nconst postsCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({\n\t\ttitle: z.string(),\n\t\tpublished: z.date(),\n\t\tupdated: z.date().optional(),\n\t\tdraft: z.boolean().optional().default(false),\n\t\tdescription: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\timage: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\ttags: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),\n\t\tcategory: z.string().optional().nullable().default(\"\"),\n\t\tlang: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\n\t\t/* For internal use */\n\t\tprevTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tprevSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t}),\n});\nconst specCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({}),\n});\nexport const collections = {\n\tposts: postsCollection,\n\tspec: specCollection,\n};",

        "originalContents": "import { defineCollection, z } from \"astro:content\";\n\nconst postsCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({\n\t\ttitle: z.string(),\n\t\tpublished: z.date(),\n\t\tupdated: z.date().optional(),\n\t\tdraft: z.boolean().optional().default(false),\n\t\tdescription: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\timage: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\ttags: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),\n\t\tcategory: z.string().optional().nullable().default(\"\"),\n\t\tlang: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\n\t\t/* For internal use */\n\t\tprevTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tprevSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t}),\n});\nconst specCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({}),\n});\nexport const collections = {\n\tposts: postsCollection,\n\tspec: specCollection,\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari  \n\nMột mẫu blog tĩnh được xây bằng [Astro](https://astro.build).\n\n[**🖥️ Xem bản dùng thử (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Hình ảnh xem trước](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ Tính năng\n\n- [x] Được xây dựng bằng [Astro](https://astro.build) và [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)\n- [x] Có hoạt ảnh đổi chuyển trang mượt mà\n- [x] Chế độ sáng / tối\n- [x] Màu sắc và biểu ngữ có thể tùy chỉnh được\n- [x] Thiết kế nhanh nhạy\n- [x] Có chức năng tìm kiếm với [Pagefind](https://pagefind.app/)\n- [x] [Có các tính năng mở rộng của Markdown](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari?tab=readme-ov-file#-markdown-extended-syntax)\n- [x] Có mục lục\n- [x] Nguồn cấp dữ liệu RSS\n\n## 🚀 Bắt đầu\n\n1. Tạo kho lưu trữ blog của bạn:\n    - [Tạo một kho lưu trữ mới](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate) từ mẫu này hoặc fork kho lưu trữ này.\n    - Hoặc chạy một trong các lệnh sau:\n       &#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n       npm create fuwari@latest\n       yarn create fuwari\n       pnpm create fuwari@latest\n       bun create fuwari@latest\n       deno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n       &#96;&#96;&#96;\n2. Để chỉnh sửa blog của bạn trên máy cục bộ, hãy clone kho lưu trữ của bạn, chạy lệnh &#96;pnpm install&#96; để cài đặt các phụ thuộc..\n    - Cài đặt [pnpm](https://pnpm.io) &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96; nếu chưa có.\n3. Chỉnh sửa tệp cấu hình &#96;src/config.ts&#96; để tùy chỉnh blog của bạn.\n4. Chạy &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96; để tạo một bài viết mới và chỉnh sửa nó trong &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.\n5. Triển khai blog của bạn lên Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc. theo [chỉ dẫn](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/). Bạn cần chỉnh sửa cấu hình trang web trong &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; trước khi triển khai.\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import type {\n\tExpressiveCodeConfig,\n\tLicenseConfig,\n\tNavBarConfig,\n\tProfileConfig,\n\tSiteConfig,\n} from \"./types/config\";\nimport { LinkPreset } from \"./types/config\";\n\nexport const siteConfig: SiteConfig = {\n\ttitle: \"Home\",\n\tsubtitle: \"Portfolio\",\n\tlang: \"en\", // Language code, e.g. 'en', 'zh_CN', 'ja', etc.\n\tthemeColor: {\n\t\thue: 250, // Default hue for the theme color, from 0 to 360. e.g. red: 0, teal: 200, cyan: 250, pink: 345\n\t\tfixed: false, // Hide the theme color picker for visitors\n\t},\n\tbanner: {\n\t\tenable: false,\n\t\tsrc: \"assets/images/banner.png\", // Relative to the /src directory. Relative to the /public directory if it starts with '/'\n\t\tposition: \"center\", // Equivalent to object-position, only supports 'top', 'center', 'bottom'. 'center' by default\n\t\tcredit: {\n\t\t\tenable: true, // Display the credit text of the banner image\n\t\t\ttext: \"Portfolio by Tomoaki Tsutsui\", // Credit text to be displayed\n\t\t\turl: \"\", // (Optional) URL link to the original artwork or artist's page\n\t\t},\n\t},\n\ttoc: {\n\t\tenable: true, // Display the table of contents on the right side of the post\n\t\tdepth: 2, // Maximum heading depth to show in the table, from 1 to 3\n\t},\n\tfavicon: [\n\t\t// Leave this array empty to use the default favicon\n\t\t{\n\t\t  src: '/favicon/icon.png',    // Path of the favicon, relative to the /public directory\n\t\t//   theme: 'light',              // (Optional) Either 'light' or 'dark', set only if you have different favicons for light and dark mode\n\t\t  sizes: '32x32',              // (Optional) Size of the favicon, set only if you have favicons of different sizes\n\t\t}\n\t],\n};",

        "originalContents": "import type {\n\tExpressiveCodeConfig,\n\tLicenseConfig,\n\tNavBarConfig,\n\tProfileConfig,\n\tSiteConfig,\n} from \"./types/config\";\nimport { LinkPreset } from \"./types/config\";\n\nexport const siteConfig: SiteConfig = {\n\ttitle: \"Home\",\n\tsubtitle: \"Portfolio\",\n\tlang: \"en\", // Language code, e.g. 'en', 'zh_CN', 'ja', etc.\n\tthemeColor: {\n\t\thue: 250, // Default hue for the theme color, from 0 to 360. e.g. red: 0, teal: 200, cyan: 250, pink: 345\n\t\tfixed: false, // Hide the theme color picker for visitors\n\t},\n\tbanner: {\n\t\tenable: false,\n\t\tsrc: \"assets/images/banner.png\", // Relative to the /src directory. Relative to the /public directory if it starts with '/'\n\t\tposition: \"center\", // Equivalent to object-position, only supports 'top', 'center', 'bottom'. 'center' by default\n\t\tcredit: {\n\t\t\tenable: true, // Display the credit text of the banner image\n\t\t\ttext: \"Portfolio by Tomoaki Tsutsui\", // Credit text to be displayed\n\t\t\turl: \"\", // (Optional) URL link to the original artwork or artist's page\n\t\t},\n\t},\n\ttoc: {\n\t\tenable: true, // Display the table of contents on the right side of the post\n\t\tdepth: 2, // Maximum heading depth to show in the table, from 1 to 3\n\t},\n\tfavicon: [\n\t\t// Leave this array empty to use the default favicon\n\t\t{\n\t\t  src: '/favicon/icon.png',    // Path of the favicon, relative to the /public directory\n\t\t//   theme: 'light',              // (Optional) Either 'light' or 'dark', set only if you have different favicons for light and dark mode\n\t\t  sizes: '32x32',              // (Optional) Size of the favicon, set only if you have favicons of different sizes\n\t\t}\n\t],\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n[Astro](https://astro.build)로 구축된 정적 블로그 템플릿입니다.\n\n[**🖥️미리보기 (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 특징\n\n- [x] [Astro](https://astro.build) 및 [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)로 구축됨\n- [x] 부드러운 애니메이션 및 페이지 전환\n- [x] 라이트 모드 / 다크 모드\n- [x] 사용자 정의 가능한 테마 색상 및 배너\n- [x] 반응형 디자인\n- [x] [Pagefind](https://pagefind.app/)를 이용한 검색 기능\n- [x] [Markdown 확장 기능](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari?tab=readme-ov-file#-markdown-extended-syntax)\n- [x] 목차\n- [x] RSS 피드\n\n## 🚀 시작하기\n1. 블로그 저장소를 생성하세요:\n   - 이 템플릿에서 [새 저장소를 생성](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)하거나 이 저장소를 포크하세요.\n   - 또는 다음 명령어 중 하나를 실행하세요:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n       npm create fuwari@latest\n       yarn create fuwari\n       pnpm create fuwari@latest\n       bun create fuwari@latest\n       deno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n2. 로컬에서 블로그를 수정하려면, 저장소를 복제하고 &#96;pnpm install&#96;을 실행하여 종속성을 설치하세요.\n   - [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)이 설치되어 있지 않다면 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;을 실행하여 설치하세요.\n3. &#96;src/config.ts&#96;설정 파일을 수정하여 블로그를 커스터마이징하세요.\n4. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96;을 실행하여 새 게시물을 만들고 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;에서 수정하세요.\n5. [가이드](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/)에 따라 블로그를 Vercel, Netlify, Github Pages 등에 배포하세요. 배포하기 전에 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96;에서 사이트 구성을 수정해야 합니다.\n\n## ⚙️ 게시물의 머리말 설정\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: 내 첫 블로그 게시물\npublished: 2023-09-09\n",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "4. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96;을 실행하여 새 게시물을 만들고 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;에서 수정하세요."

        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\n[Astro](https://astro.build)로 구축된 정적 블로그 템플릿입니다.\n\n[**🖥️미리보기 (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ 특징\n\n- [x] [Astro](https://astro.build) 및 [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)로 구축됨\n- [x] 부드러운 애니메이션 및 페이지 전환\n- [x] 라이트 모드 / 다크 모드\n- [x] 사용자 정의 가능한 테마 색상 및 배너\n- [x] 반응형 디자인\n- [x] [Pagefind](https://pagefind.app/)를 이용한 검색 기능\n- [x] [Markdown 확장 기능](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari?tab=readme-ov-file#-markdown-extended-syntax)\n- [x] 목차\n- [x] RSS 피드\n\n## 🚀 시작하기\n1. 블로그 저장소를 생성하세요:\n   - 이 템플릿에서 [새 저장소를 생성](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate)하거나 이 저장소를 포크하세요.\n   - 또는 다음 명령어 중 하나를 실행하세요:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n       npm create fuwari@latest\n       yarn create fuwari\n       pnpm create fuwari@latest\n       bun create fuwari@latest\n       deno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n2. 로컬에서 블로그를 수정하려면, 저장소를 복제하고 &#96;pnpm install&#96;을 실행하여 종속성을 설치하세요.\n   - [pnpm](https://pnpm.io)이 설치되어 있지 않다면 &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96;을 실행하여 설치하세요.\n3. &#96;src/config.ts&#96;설정 파일을 수정하여 블로그를 커스터마이징하세요.\n4. &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cfilename\u003e&#96;을 실행하여 새 게시물을 만들고 &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;에서 수정하세요.\n5. [가이드](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/)에 따라 블로그를 Vercel, Netlify, Github Pages 등에 배포하세요. 배포하기 전에 &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96;에서 사이트 구성을 수정해야 합니다.\n\n## ⚙️ 게시물의 머리말 설정\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n---\ntitle: 내 첫 블로그 게시물\npublished: 2023-09-09\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\nUn tema estático para blogs construido con [Astro](https://astro.build).\n\n[**🖥️ Demostración en Vivo (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Imagen de Vista Previa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ Características\n\n- [x] Construido con [Astro](https://astro.build) y [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)\n- [x] Animaciones suaves y transiciones de página\n- [x] Modo claro / oscuro\n- [x] Colores del tema y banner personalizables\n- [x] Diseño responsivo\n- [ ] Comentarios\n- [x] Buscador\n- [x] TOC (Tabla de Contenidos)\n\n## 👀 requiere\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 Cómo Usar 1\n\nInicializa el proyecto localmente usando [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari).\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest.\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari.\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog.\n2. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.\n3. Despliega tu blog en Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc., siguiendo [las guías](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/). Necesitas editar la configuración del sitio en &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; antes del despliegue.\n\n## 🚀 Cómo Usar 2\n\n1. [Genera un nuevo repositorio](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate) desde esta plantilla o haz un fork de este repositorio.\n2. Para editar tu blog localmente, clona tu repositorio, ejecuta &#96;pnpm install&#96; y &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; para instalar las dependencias.\n   - Instala [pnpm](https://pnpm.io) &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96; si aún no lo tienes.\n3. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog.\n4. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "deno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "1. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "2. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "3. Despliega tu blog en Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc., siguiendo [las guías](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/). Necesitas editar la configuración del sitio en &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; antes del despliegue."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "## 🚀 Cómo Usar 2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "1. [Genera un nuevo repositorio](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate) desde esta plantilla o haz un fork de este repositorio."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "2. Para editar tu blog localmente, clona tu repositorio, ejecuta &#96;pnpm install&#96; y &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; para instalar las dependencias."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   - Instala [pnpm](https://pnpm.io) &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96; si aún no lo tienes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "3. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "4. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "5. Despliega tu blog en Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc., siguiendo [las guías](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/). Necesitas editar la configuración del sitio en &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; antes del despliegue."
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 🍥Fuwari\n\nUn tema estático para blogs construido con [Astro](https://astro.build).\n\n[**🖥️ Demostración en Vivo (Vercel)**](https://fuwari.vercel.app)\n\n![Imagen de Vista Previa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/saicaca/resource/main/fuwari/home.png)\n\n## ✨ Características\n\n- [x] Construido con [Astro](https://astro.build) y [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com)\n- [x] Animaciones suaves y transiciones de página\n- [x] Modo claro / oscuro\n- [x] Colores del tema y banner personalizables\n- [x] Diseño responsivo\n- [ ] Comentarios\n- [x] Buscador\n- [x] TOC (Tabla de Contenidos)\n\n## 👀 requiere\n\n- Node.js \u003c= 22\n- pnpm \u003c= 9\n\n## 🚀 Cómo Usar 1\n\nInicializa el proyecto localmente usando [create-fuwari](https://github.com/L4Ph/create-fuwari).\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sh\n# npm\nnpm create fuwari@latest.\n\n# yarn\nyarn create fuwari.\n\n# pnpm\npnpm create fuwari@latest\n\n# bun\nbun create fuwari@latest\n\n# deno\ndeno run -A npm:create-fuwari@latest\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n1. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog.\n2. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.\n3. Despliega tu blog en Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc., siguiendo [las guías](https://docs.astro.build/en/guides/deploy/). Necesitas editar la configuración del sitio en &#96;astro.config.mjs&#96; antes del despliegue.\n\n## 🚀 Cómo Usar 2\n\n1. [Genera un nuevo repositorio](https://github.com/saicaca/fuwari/generate) desde esta plantilla o haz un fork de este repositorio.\n2. Para editar tu blog localmente, clona tu repositorio, ejecuta &#96;pnpm install&#96; y &#96;pnpm add sharp&#96; para instalar las dependencias.\n   - Instala [pnpm](https://pnpm.io) &#96;npm install -g pnpm&#96; si aún no lo tienes.\n3. Edita el archivo de configuración &#96;src/config.ts&#96; para personalizar tu blog.\n4. Ejecuta &#96;pnpm new-post \u003cnombre-de-archivo\u003e&#96; para crear una nueva entrada y edítala en &#96;src/content/posts/&#96;.\n",
        "range": {

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,173 @@
- 
+ #!/usr/bin/env python3
+ # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
+ """
+ Hexo形式の記事をFuwari形式に変換するスクリプト
+ """
+ import os
+ import re
+ import yaml
+ from pathlib import Path
+ from datetime import datetime
+ 
+ def parse_hexo_frontmatter(content):
+     """Hexo形式のフロントマターをパース"""
+     match = re.match(r'^---\n(.*?)\n---\n', content, re.DOTALL)
+     if not match:
+         return None, content
+     
+     frontmatter_text = match.group(1)
+     body = content[match.end():]
+     
+     try:
+         frontmatter = yaml.safe_load(frontmatter_text)
+         return frontmatter, body
+     except:
+         return None, content
+ 
+ def convert_to_fuwari_frontmatter(hexo_fm):
+     """Hexo形式のフロントマターをFuwari形式に変換"""
+     fuwari_fm = {}
+     
+     # title
+     if 'title' in hexo_fm:
+         fuwari_fm['title'] = hexo_fm['title']
+     
+     # published (dateから変換)
+     if 'date' in hexo_fm:
+         date_str = hexo_fm['date']
+         # 日付文字列をパース
+         if isinstance(date_str, str):
+             # "2014-06-01 00:00:00" 形式を処理
+             date_str = date_str.split()[0]  # 日付部分のみ取得
+         fuwari_fm['published'] = date_str
+     
+     # category (categoriesの最初の要素)
+     if 'categories' in hexo_fm and hexo_fm['categories']:
+         fuwari_fm['category'] = hexo_fm['categories'][0] if isinstance(hexo_fm['categories'], list) else hexo_fm['categories']
+     elif 'category' in hexo_fm:
+         fuwari_fm['category'] = hexo_fm['category']
+     
+     # tags
+     if 'tags' in hexo_fm:
+         if isinstance(hexo_fm['tags'], list):
+             fuwari_fm['tags'] = [tag for tag in hexo_fm['tags'] if tag]  # 空文字列を除外
+         else:
+             fuwari_fm['tags'] = [hexo_fm['tags']] if hexo_fm['tags'] else []
+     else:
+         fuwari_fm['tags'] = []
+     
+     # draft (デフォルトfalse)
+     fuwari_fm['draft'] = hexo_fm.get('draft', False)
+     
+     # description (空文字列をデフォルト)
+     fuwari_fm['description'] = hexo_fm.get('description', '')
+     
+     # image (画像パスから抽出)
+     image_path = extract_image_path(hexo_fm.get('body', ''))
+     if image_path:
+         fuwari_fm['image'] = image_path
+     
+     return fuwari_fm
+ 
+ def extract_image_path(body):
+     """本文から画像パスを抽出"""
+     # &lt;img src="/img/cover/xxx.jpg"&gt; 形式を検索
+     img_match = re.search(r'&lt;img\s+src=["\'](/img/cover/[^"\']+)["\']', body)
+     if img_match:
+         return img_match.group(1)
+     return None
+ 
+ def convert_image_paths(body):
+     """画像パスを修正（大文字小文字を統一）"""
+     # JPG -&gt; jpg に統一（実際のファイル名に合わせる）
+     body = re.sub(r'(/img/cover/[^"\']+)\.JPG', r'\1.jpg', body, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
+     return body
+ 
+ def convert_filename(old_filename):
+     """ファイル名をFuwari形式に変換"""
+     # YYYY_MM_タイトル.md -&gt; YYYY-MM-DD_タイトル.md
+     # YYYY-MM-DD_タイトル.md -&gt; そのまま
+     
+     base_name = Path(old_filename).stem
+     
+     # アンダースコア区切りの場合
+     if '_' in base_name and not base_name.startswith('202'):
+         # 最初の部分が日付形式かチェック
+         parts = base_name.split('_', 2)
+         if len(parts) &gt;= 3:
+             year_month = parts[0]
+             if len(year_month) == 7 and year_month[4] == '_':
+                 # YYYY_MM 形式
+                 year = year_month[:4]
+                 month = year_month[5:7]
+                 new_name = f"{year}-{month}-01_{parts[1]}_{parts[2]}" if len(parts) &gt; 2 else f"{year}-{month}-01_{parts[1]}"
+                 return f"{new_name}.md"
+     
+     # 既にハイフン区切りの場合はそのまま
+     return old_filename
+ 
+ def convert_post(input_path, output_dir):
+     """1つの記事を変換"""
+     print(f"変換中: {input_path.name}")
+     
+     # ファイルを読み込み
+     with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+         content = f.read()
+     
+     # フロントマターをパース
+     hexo_fm, body = parse_hexo_frontmatter(content)
+     
+     if not hexo_fm:
+         print(f"  警告: フロントマターが見つかりません: {input_path.name}")
+         return
+     
+     # Fuwari形式のフロントマターに変換
+     fuwari_fm = convert_to_fuwari_frontmatter(hexo_fm)
+     
+     # 画像パスを修正
+     body = convert_image_paths(body)
+     
+     # 画像パスが本文から抽出できた場合は、フロントマターに追加
+     image_path = extract_image_path(body)
+     if image_path and 'image' not in fuwari_fm:
+         fuwari_fm['image'] = image_path
+     
+     # 新しいファイル名を生成
+     new_filename = convert_filename(input_path.name)
+     output_path = output_dir / new_filename
+     
+     # Fuwari形式のフロントマターを生成
+     frontmatter_yaml = yaml.dump(fuwari_fm, allow_unicode=True, default_flow_style=False, sort_keys=False)
+     
+     # 新しいコンテンツを生成
+     new_content = f"---\n{frontmatter_yaml}---\n\n{body}"
+     
+     # ファイルを書き込み
+     with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+         f.write(new_content)
+     
+     print(f"  完了: {output_path.name}")
+ 
+ def main():
+     input_dir = Path('/Users/tomoaki.tsutsui/dev/git/site/output/output-over-there-main/source/_posts')
+     output_dir = Path('/Users/tomoaki.tsutsui/dev/git/site/output/src/content/posts')
+     
+     # 出力ディレクトリを作成
+     output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+     
+     # すべてのMarkdownファイルを処理
+     md_files = sorted(input_dir.glob('*.md'))
+     
+     print(f"見つかったファイル数: {len(md_files)}")
+     
+     for md_file in md_files:
+         try:
+             convert_post(md_file, output_dir)
+         except Exception as e:
+             print(f"  エラー: {md_file.name} - {e}")
+     
+     print("\n変換完了!")
+ 
+ if __name__ == '__main__':
+     main()
+ 
```

-             frontmatter_lines.append(f"{key}: {value}")
+     
+     # title
+     if 'title' in fuwari_fm:
+         frontmatter_lines.append(f"title: {fuwari_fm['title']}")
+     
+     # published
+     if 'published' in fuwari_fm:
+         frontmatter_lines.append(f"published: {fuwari_fm['published']}")
+     
+     # description
+     if 'description' in fuwari_fm and fuwari_fm['description']:
+         desc = fuwari_fm['description']
+         if ':' in desc or '"' in desc or '\n' in desc:
+             escaped_desc = desc.replace('"', '\\"')
+             frontmatter_lines.append(f'description: "{escaped_desc}"')
+         else:
+             frontmatter_lines.append(f"description: {desc}")
+     
+     # image
+     if 'image' in fuwari_fm and fuwari_fm['image']:
+         frontmatter_lines.append(f"image: {fuwari_fm['image']}")
+     
+     # tags
+     if 'tags' in fuwari_fm:
+         tags = fuwari_fm['tags']
+         if tags:
+             quoted_tags = [f'"{tag}"' for tag in tags]
+             frontmatter_lines.append(f"tags: [{', '.join(quoted_tags)}]")
+         else:
+             frontmatter_lines.append("tags: []")
+     
+     # category
+     if 'category' in fuwari_fm and fuwari_fm['category']:
+         frontmatter_lines.append(f"category: {fuwari_fm['category']}")
+     
+     # draft
+     if 'draft' in fuwari_fm:
+         frontmatter_lines.append(f"draft: {str(fuwari_fm['draft']).lower()}")
      
      frontmatter_yaml = '\n'.join(frontmatter_lines)
      
      # 新しいコンテンツを生成
-     new_content = f"---\n{frontmatter_yaml}---\n\n{body}"
+     new_content = f"---\n{frontmatter_yaml}\n---\n\n{body}"
      
      # ファイルを書き込み

      frontmatter = {}

-         line = line.strip()

              value = value.strip()
              
-             # リスト形式の処理
-             if value.startswith('-'):
-                 # リスト項目
-                 if key not in frontmatter:
-                     frontmatter[key] = []
+             # 値が空の場合、次の行をチェック
+             if not value:
+                 # 次の行がリスト項目かチェック
+                 if i + 1 &lt; len(lines):
+                     next_line = lines[i + 1].strip()
+                     if next_line.startswith('-'):
+                         # リスト形式
+                         frontmatter[key] = []
+                         i += 1
+                         while i &lt; len(lines) and lines[i].strip().startswith('-'):
+                             item = lines[i].strip()[1:].strip().strip('"\'')
+                             frontmatter[key].append(item)
+                             i += 1
+                         continue
+                     else:
+                         frontmatter[key] = ''
+                 else:
+                     frontmatter[key] = ''
+             elif value.startswith('-'):

+                 frontmatter[key] = []
                  item = value[1:].strip().strip('"\'')
                  frontmatter[key].append(item)
              else:
                  frontmatter[key] = parse_yaml_value(value)

+         i += 1
      
      return frontmatter, body

- 
+ ---
+ title: Javaによる関数型プログラミングJava8ラムダ式とStream
+ published: 2020-04-01
+ tags: []
+ draft: false
+ ---
+ 
+ # Javaによる関数型プログラミングJava8ラムダ式とStream
+ 
+ - 著者：vankat subramaniam
+ - 訳：株式会社プログラミングシステム社
+ - 2014年10月 発行
+ - オライリー本
+ 
+ ## まえがき
+ 
+ ## はじめに
+ 
+ ### 対象者
+ 
+ - Java5経験者
+ - 他の言語で関数型プログラミングを行っていて、Javaで実施したい人
+ - すでにラムダ式に詳しい人は、チームメンバーのトレーニングに使用できる
+ 
+ ### 本書の内容
+ 
+ - 最初から最後まで通して読むことをおすすめする（前の章で紹介した内容を後ろの章で使ってる）
+ 
+ ### 使用するJavaのバージョン
+ 
+ - &#96;Java8&#96;が必要
+ 
+ ### サンプルコードの読み方
+ 
+ - サンプル
+   - &lt;https://pragprog.com/titles/vsjava8/source_code&gt;
+

## 完了した作業

1. **画像ファイルの移行**: `output-over-there-main/docs/img/cover/` から `public/img/cover/` に52個の画像ファイルをコピーしました。

2. **記事ファイルの変換**: 61個の記事ファイルをFuwari形式に変換しました：
   - フロントマターをFuwari形式に変換（`title`, `published`, `image`, `tags`, `category`, `draft`）
   - 画像パスを `/img/cover/` 形式に修正
   - 日付形式を `YYYY-MM-DD` に統一

   - `tags` を配列形式に変換

3. **記事の移行**: 変換した記事を `src/content/posts/` に配置しました（合計66個のMarkdownファイル）。

変換例：
- 元の形式: `categories: - Java`, `tags: - 教科書`, `date: 2014-06-01 00:00:00`
- Fuwari形式: `category: Java`, `tags: ["教科書"]`, `published: 2014-06-01`

全記事のカテゴリを「書籍」に統一し、現在のカテゴリ値をtagsに追加します。一括処理用のスクリプトを作成します。


_**Agent (default)**_

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: /Users/tomoaki.tsutsui/dev/git/site/output/update_categories.py</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 124, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,124 @@
- 
+ #!/usr/bin/env python3
+ # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
+ """
+ 記事ファイルのカテゴリを「書籍」に統一し、現在のカテゴリをtagsに追加するスクリプト
+ """
+ import re
+ from pathlib import Path
+ 
+ def update_post_file(file_path):
+     """1つの記事ファイルを更新"""
+     print(f"処理中: {file_path.name}")
+     
+     with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+         content = f.read()
+     
+     # フロントマターをパース
+     match = re.match(r'^(---\n.*?\n---\n)', content, re.DOTALL)
+     if not match:
+         print(f"  警告: フロントマターが見つかりません: {file_path.name}")
+         return
+     
+     frontmatter_text = match.group(1)
+     body = content[match.end():]
+     
+     # 現在のcategoryとtagsを取得
+     current_category = None
+     tags_match = re.search(r'^tags:\s*(.*?)$', frontmatter_text, re.MULTILINE)
+     current_tags = []
+     
+     if tags_match:
+         tags_value = tags_match.group(1).strip()
+         # 配列形式をパース ["tag1", "tag2"] または []
+         if tags_value.startswith('[') and tags_value.endswith(']'):
+             tags_content = tags_value[1:-1]
+             if tags_content:
+                 # クォートを除去
+                 current_tags = [tag.strip().strip('"\'') for tag in tags_content.split(',') if tag.strip()]
+     
+     category_match = re.search(r'^category:\s*(.*?)$', frontmatter_text, re.MULTILINE)
+     if category_match:
+         current_category = category_match.group(1).strip()
+     
+     # categoryが存在し、空でなく、「書籍」でない場合、tagsに追加
+     if current_category and current_category != '' and current_category != '書籍':
+         if current_category not in current_tags:
+             current_tags.append(current_category)
+     
+     # 新しいフロントマターを生成
+     lines = frontmatter_text.split('\n')
+     new_lines = []
+     in_tags = False
+     tags_updated = False
+     category_updated = False
+     
+     for line in lines:
+         if line.startswith('tags:'):
+             # tagsを更新
+             if current_tags:
+                 quoted_tags = [f'"{tag}"' for tag in current_tags]
+                 new_lines.append(f"tags: [{', '.join(quoted_tags)}]")
+             else:
+                 new_lines.append("tags: []")
+             tags_updated = True
+             in_tags = False
+         elif line.startswith('category:'):
+             # categoryを「書籍」に変更
+             new_lines.append("category: 書籍")
+             category_updated = True
+         elif in_tags and line.strip().startswith('-'):
+             # リスト形式のtags項目をスキップ（既に処理済み）
+             continue
+         else:
+             new_lines.append(line)
+             if line.strip() == '':
+                 in_tags = False
+             elif 'tags:' in line.lower():
+                 in_tags = True
+     
+     # tagsが存在しない場合は追加
+     if not tags_updated:
+         # categoryの後に追加
+         for i, line in enumerate(new_lines):
+             if line.startswith('category:'):
+                 new_lines.insert(i + 1, f"tags: [{', '.join([f'\"{tag}\"' for tag in current_tags])}]" if current_tags else "tags: []")
+                 tags_updated = True
+                 break
+     
+     # categoryが存在しない場合は追加
+     if not category_updated:
+         # publishedの後に追加
+         for i, line in enumerate(new_lines):
+             if line.startswith('published:'):
+                 new_lines.insert(i + 1, "category: 書籍")
+                 category_updated = True
+                 break
+     
+     new_frontmatter = '\n'.join(new_lines)
+     new_content = new_frontmatter + body
+     
+     # ファイルを書き込み
+     with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
+         f.write(new_content)
+     
+     print(f"  完了: category={current_category} -&gt; 書籍, tagsに追加={current_category if current_category and current_category != '書籍' else 'なし'}")
+ 
+ def main():
+     posts_dir = Path('/Users/tomoaki.tsutsui/dev/git/site/output/src/content/posts')
+     
+     # すべてのMarkdownファイルを処理
+     md_files = sorted(posts_dir.glob('*.md'))
+     
+     print(f"見つかったファイル数: {len(md_files)}")
+     
+     for md_file in md_files:
+         try:
+             update_post_file(md_file)
+         except Exception as e:
+             print(f"  エラー: {md_file.name} - {e}")
+     
+     print("\n処理完了!")
+ 
+ if __name__ == '__main__':
+     main()
+ 
```

## 完了した作業

1. **カテゴリの統一**: すべての記事の`category`を「書籍」に変更しました。
2. **タグの追加**: 元のカテゴリ値（Java、NW、DB、VBA、HTML、EXなど）を`tags`に追加しました。

### 更新例

- **更新前**:
  - `category: Java`
  - `tags: ["教科書"]`

- **更新後**:
  - `category: 書籍`
  - `tags: ["教科書", "Java"]`
